history.reason: First ratchet — measured 967 errors on the hardening branch (mypy core api kernel --ignore-missing-imports). Tightening to 1000 catches any regression instead of letting 4x headroom hide drift.

Second ratchet — measured 840 errors post Phase-1 auth unification (PRs #71-73). Budget = 840 + 30 buffer. Top offenders: core/executor/pipeline_auto.py (48), core/aios_manifest.py (33), business/business_engine.py (22).

policy: Ratchet this number downward after each cleanup; CI fails on increases. Aim for current_count + ~30 buffer when bumping.
